meta.name: v1_finance_qa_10
meta.description: 10-question constrained finance QA dataset derived only from local metadata/text signals inside the two allowed PDFs.
derivation_notes: Questions are sourced only from the two approved files.
No external corpus or internet data is used.
This V1 dataset focuses on explicit deck identity/quarter metadata facts.

items.question: What quarter is covered by the first approved update deck PDF?
What quarter is covered by the second approved update deck PDF?
What is the exact title of the first approved deck?
What is the exact title of the second approved deck?
Which software created both quarterly update PDFs?
Who is listed as the author in the Q4 quarterly update deck metadata?
Which quarter in scope is later: Q3 or Q4 of 2025?
How many quarterly update decks are included in this constrained corpus?
What is the producer string shown in the Q4 PDF metadata?
What created timestamp appears in the Q4 PDF metadata?
